name: Space Dragster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>調</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のドラッグスター
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Machine-Type/Tuner/FIRE/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 1800). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) If Summoned this way, other Tuners you control cannot be destroyed by battle or your opponent's card effects while this card is in the Monster Zone.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Machine-Type/Tuner/FIRE/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 1800). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) If Summoned this way, other Tuners you control cannot be destroyed by battle or your opponent's card effects while this card is in the Monster Zone.

sets.set: Invasion: Vengeance Sneak Peek Participation Card

stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
